attributes.action: Morgan Gibbs White should be in the England Team for the World Cup.
attributes.additional_details: Morgan Gibbs-White has earned the right to represent England. His passion, creativity, determination, and commitment embody everything supporters want to see in a Three Lions shirt. Week after week, he proves himself among the nation’s best players, inspiring fans and teammates alike. Football is more than a game in England—it’s our identity, our pride, and our dream. Morgan deserves the chance to help lead this country forward and play his part in finally bringing football home
attributes.background: Morgan Gibbs-White has consistently proven himself to be one of England’s most talented and influential footballers. His creativity, work ethic, leadership, and ability to change games make him a player who deserves to wear the Three Lions shirt.
